title: Capital Float Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Capital Float Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
